name: 简约清新主副标题
author: r-markdown
description: 颜色可以搜索后整体替换
content:
<!-- 素材开始 -->
<column gap="0px" align="stretch" justify="center" wrap="false" margin="20px 0" padding="0px">

<container padding="0px" margin="0px" border-style="none" radius="0px" direction="row" align="center-center" extra-style="display:inline-flex">
<text color="#ffffff" margin="-10px 5px 0 0" extra-style="text-shadow:#ffd56f 0em 0.063em 0em, #ffd56f 0.063em 0em 0em,#ffd56f 0.063em 0.063em 0em, #ffd56f -0.062em -0.062em 0em, #ffd56f 0.063em -0.062em 0em, #ffd56f -0.062em 0.063em 0em, #ffd56f 0em -0.062em 0em,#ffd56f -0.062em 0em 0em">「</text>
<text color="#ffffff" decoration="none" extra-style="text-shadow:#27ae60 0em 0.063em 0em, #27ae60 0.063em 0em 0em,#27ae60 0.063em 0.063em 0em, #27ae60 -0.062em -0.062em 0em, #27ae60 0.063em -0.062em 0em, #27ae60 -0.062em 0.063em 0em, #27ae60 0em -0.062em 0em,#27ae60 -0.062em 0em 0em;border-bottom: 2px dashed #27ae60">万事俱备 只欠东风</text>
<text color="#ffffff" margin="0 0 -10px 5px" extra-style="text-shadow:#ffd56f 0em 0.063em 0em, #ffd56f 0.063em 0em 0em,#ffd56f 0.063em 0.063em 0em, #ffd56f -0.062em -0.062em 0em, #ffd56f 0.063em -0.062em 0em, #ffd56f -0.062em 0.063em 0em, #ffd56f 0em -0.062em 0em,#ffd56f -0.062em 0em 0em">」</text>
</container>

<container padding="0px" margin="2px 0px 0px" border-style="none" radius="0px" direction="row" align="center-center" extra-style="display:inline-flex">
<text color="#ffd56f" size="11px">WAITING FOR OPPERTUNITY</text>
</container>

</column>
<!-- 素材结束 -->
